name_cn:
Model 30012
The new favorite LOEWE Puzzle features a gradient color scheme that looks like sunset hues woven into the bag body
The woven handle is exquisite and unique, giving a relaxed vibe when carried casually
The 3D geometric shape is super spacious, perfect for daily outings or short trips 🎒
Just stuff everything in and go
Wear it on the street and turn heads instantly
Finally understand why fashionistas love LOEWE
Practical and stylish, whoever wears it becomes a walking fashion recommendation 🌿
- 24cm
